title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Newgen Software

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Newgen Software
jsonLd.description:
Join the Newgen Software family as a Frontend Developer in Kanpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Newgen Software:
Newgen Software is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Newgen Software!
